creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
diff -ruN ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-Tex
tMessage/Makefile
--- ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile       Tue Apr 24 19:37:16 2001
+++ ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile   Tue Apr 24 19:37:29 2001
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile,v 1.2 2001/04/17 09:35:09
 roam Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=      LJ-TextMessage
-PORTVERSION=   1.3
+PORTVERSION=   1.4
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  http://livejournal.com/files/code/textmessage/ \
                ftp://ftp.livejournal.com/code/textmessage/
diff -ruN ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-Tex
tMessage/distinfo
--- ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo       Tue Apr 24 19:37:16 2001
+++ ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo   Tue Apr 24 19:37:55 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.3.tar.gz) = 1b0d973cf17e6696daec81611221cbef
+MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.4.tar.gz) = 3ee9270a7f86d149f3f0006950207f16
